title: TruthCert/Burhan Evidence Graph Schema Index
description: Schema index for TruthCert v0.8 'Nets-Level, Witness-Governed'

witness_system.description: Witness grades and quorum per Section 7

rules: 1. Witness-first: no published number without a witness chain
2. Guardianship: validators never generate; they only recompute/check/veto
3. Right names: ontology is law; free-text is quarantined until mapped
4. Mercy-by-impact: maps publish early; meta/transport/HTA require stronger gates
5. Consultation: disagreements become explicit objects; adjudications are logged
6. Change-aware: everything is versioned; diffs + drift ledgers are mandatory
7. Abstention: 'insufficient certainty—do not publish' is first-class

assurance_ladder.bronze: Map-grade: navigable graph + provenance; P0 schema validators pass; warnings allowed
assurance_ladder.silver: Meta-grade: publishable meta outputs; all P0 validators pass; quorum satisfied
assurance_ladder.gold: Decision-grade: stable meta over ≥N releases; transport/HTA eligible; strong witness density
